properties.remark: US HIGHWAY 180 NORTH OF DEMING...NM HIGHWAY 11 BETWEEN DEMING AND COLUMBIS...AND NM HIGHWAY 26 BETWEEN DEMING AND HATCH CLOSED FOR PART OF THE DAY DUE TO SIGNIFICANT BLOWING DUST.
VIS BELOW 1 MI FROM 0951 TO 1240 MDT. VIS 1/4 MI INTERMITTENTLY BETWEEN 1024 AND 1153 MDT.
I-10 REPORTED CLOSED BETWEEN MILE POSTS 55 AND 49...LIKELY WIND/DUST RELATED PER NMSP. REPORT FORWARDED VIA TWITTER. TIME/LOC APPROXIMATED.
LARGE TREE BRANCHES DOWN ALONG BORDERLAND ROAD BETWEEN WESTSIDE DRIVE AND DONIPHAN. DELAYED REPORT. TIME ESTIMATED.

FLOODING OCCURRING OVER PORTIONS OF CLOUDCROFT INCLUDING THE HIGH SCHOOL AREA...AROUND THE WATER TREATMENT PLANT AND OVER HIGHWAY 130. PEA SIZED HAIL ALSO COVERING THE GROUND. SAND BAGS NOW BEING UTILIZED.
INTERSECTION OF CHAUTAUQUA AND WOODLANDS ROADS IS CLOSED DUE TO WATER OVER ROADWAYS.

LANDSPOUT OBSERVED BY THE WFO OFFICE AT EPZ 2-3 MI WEST . THE FUNNEL WAS HAD A WEAK CIRCULATION CONNECTED TO THE CLOUD WITH SOME DUST DEBRIS ON THE GROUND. LASTED ABOUT 5-10 MINUTES IN THE RURAL DESERT FAR AWAY FROM ANY STRUCTURE.
